DROP TABLE IF EXISTS test_low_cardinality; CREATE TABLE test_low_cardinality (s LowCardinality(String)) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO test_low_cardinality VALUES ('ab'), ('cd'), ('ab'), ('ab'), ('df'); INSERT INTO test_low_cardinality VALUES ('ef'), ('cd'), ('ab'), ('cd'), ('ef'); SELECT s, lowCardinalityKeys(s) FROM test_low_cardinality;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS test_nested; CREATE TABLE test_nested (a LowCardinality(String), b Int32) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO test_nested VALUES ('xx', 1), ('yy', 2), ('zz', 3), ('xx', 4); CREATE TABLE test_nested2 (c LowCardinality(String), d Int32) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO test_nested2 VALUES ('xx', 100), ('yy', 200), ('zz', 300); SELECT n.a, lowCardinalityKeys(n.a) FROM test_nested n JOIN test_nested2 n2 ON n.a = n2.c;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS test_complex; CREATE TABLE test_complex (s LowCardinality(String), t Int32) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO test_complex VALUES ('value1', 1), ('value2', 2), ('value3', 3); SELECT s, lowCardinalityKeys(s) AS keys FROM (SELECT DISTINCT s FROM test_complex) AS subquery;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS test_with_nulls; CREATE TABLE test_with_nulls (s LowCardinality(String), t Nullable(Int32)) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO test_with_nulls VALUES ('hello', 1), ('world', NULL), ('hello', NULL), ('test', 2); SELECT s, lowCardinalityKeys(s) FROM test_with_nulls WHERE t IS NOT NULL;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS test_multiple_cols; CREATE TABLE test_multiple_cols (s LowCardinality(String), t LowCardinality(String), u Int32) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO test_multiple_cols VALUES ('cat', 'A', 1), ('dog', 'B', 2), ('fish', 'A', 3); SELECT u, lowCardinalityKeys(s), lowCardinalityKeys(t) FROM test_multiple_cols;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS test_truncation; CREATE TABLE test_truncation (s LowCardinality(String)) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO test_truncation VALUES ('short'), ('medium'), ('longer'); SELECT lowCardinalityKeys(s) FROM test_truncation LIMIT 2;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS test_extension; CREATE TABLE test_extension (s LowCardinality(String)) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO test_extension VALUES ('one'), ('two'), ('three'); SELECT lowCardinalityKeys(s) AS keys FROM test_extension UNION ALL SELECT 'default' AS keys;
